title: Research Strategy/Plan — New Faculty Development Seminar Slides (Jeihani)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2024-03-14 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Research Strategy/Plan' presented by Mansoureh Jeihani, PhD (MSU Transportation and Urban Infrastructure Studies). Covers how to structure the Research Strategy / Research Plan section of an NIH or NSF proposal, including narrative flow, preliminary data presentation, and methods justification.
